title: rubus × semicanescens
intro: Rubus × semicanescens, also known as thimbleberry, is a hybrid deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant's medicinal properties are primarily attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, particularly ellagic acid, which has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of thimbleberry include its potential to aid in the prevention of certain cancers, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Thimbleberry can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and powder, which can be used to support overall well-being and provide relief from various health issues.
